user_story: As an HR admin, I want to specify whether a notification frequency rule is required, so that orientation notifications follow the correct policy
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Rule screen; When I set the notification frequency rule required option to Yes; Then the notification rule configuration is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a notification rule with location, mode and recurrence pattern, so that participants receive orientation notifications on a defined schedule
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Rule screen; When I click Add notification rule and enter Location(s), Mode and Recurrence pattern; Then a new notification rule is created

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view configured notification rules in a list showing location, mode and recurrence pattern, so that I can review existing rules
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Rule screen; When rules exist; Then they are listed with Location(s), Mode and Recurrence pattern columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save the notification rule or save and continue to the next step, so that my configuration is persisted
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Rule screen; When I click Save or Save & Next; Then the rule is saved and I remain or advance to the next step

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the notification rules list, so that I see the most recent rules
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Rule screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
